title: ModelRoutingLaneDecisionReceipt
description: AgentPlane evidence receipt for a model-routing lane decision. Consumed from model-router AgentExecutionModelRoutingPolicy and recorded as first-class execution evidence. Required before any model-backed execution stage. AgentPlane enforces the contract; model-router owns policy semantics.

chain_stage.description: Stage in the agent execution chain. verification defaults to no-model (mechanical tools).

lane_decision_outcome.description: denied: high-end/pro requested without escalation receipt; deferred: pending approval

escalation_receipt_ref.description: Required when selected_lane=high_end or pro and lane_decision_outcome=escalated

de_escalation_required_after_stage.description: True when the current high-end/pro selection must de-escalate in subsequent stages unless independently re-qualified

prompt_evidence_policy.description: hash_only is the default. Raw prompts are never stored.

prompt_hash_ref.description: Hash ref to prompt, per prompt_evidence_policy. Never raw text.

context_tool_posture.description: Governs tool access during this model-backed stage

verification_mode.description: Verification stage should be mechanical_tools_only by default

model_router_policy_ref.description: Ref to the AgentExecutionModelRoutingPolicy in model-router

RoutingLane.description: no_model: mechanical tools only; lightweight: fast/cheap; standard: balanced; high_end: frontier reasoning; pro: maximum capability
